com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXElectricalSymbol

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseGraphicObject, IXBaseSymbol, IXGraphicConversions, IXObject, IXPinList<IXElectricalSymbolPin>, IXSymbol, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXBackshellSymbol, IXDeviceSymbol, IXGroundSymbol, IXSpliceSymbol

    public interface IXElectricalSymbol
extends IXSymbol, IXPinList<IXElectricalSymbolPin>
    Interface representing elctrical symbols.

    • Method Detail

      • getPins

        java.util.Set<? extends IXElectricalSymbolPin> getPins()
        Get the external pins ( inclusive of pins of blocks in case of a composite symbol) of the symbol.
        Specified by:
        getPins in interface IXPinList<IXElectricalSymbolPin>
        Returns:
        the set of pins owned by this pinlist.
